# MILO

> MILO is an iOS app that gives Siri the brains of frontier AI. On iOS, only
> Siri can be triggered hands-free and system-wide — but Siri itself is limited.
> MILO routes your spoken request to the AI model you choose (GPT, Claude,
> Gemini, and more), so you can ask brilliant models anything hands-free —
> while driving, walking, or with your hands full. Works on iPhone and CarPlay,
> iOS 17.6+. Available now on the App Store.

## How it works

- Say "Hey Siri, ask MILO…" from the lock screen, headphones, or CarPlay.
- Siri hands the request off to the AI provider and model you picked.
- The answer is spoken back, hands-free.

## Providers (8)

You bring your own API keys (cloud providers) and switch by voice:

- OpenAI — GPT-5.5, GPT-5.4 and mini.
- Anthropic Claude — Claude Opus 4.8, Sonnet 4.6, Haiku.
- Google Gemini — Gemini 3.5 Flash and 3.1 Pro; generous free tier.
- Mistral AI — Large, Medium, Small; European, cost-tiered.
- Groq — Llama, GPT-OSS, Qwen, Kimi; extremely fast inference.
- OpenRouter — 200+ models behind one key; many free.
- Apple Intelligence — on-device foundation model; no key, nothing leaves the phone.
- Ollama (Local) — run Llama, Mistral and more fully offline.

## Privacy

- API keys are stored in the iOS Keychain.
- Conversation history stays on-device via SwiftData.
- No accounts; no analytics on your prompts. Only the provider you enable sees them.
- Apple Intelligence and Ollama never leave the phone.

## Pages

- [Home](https://askmilo.pro/): Product overview, providers, founder story, FAQ.
- [Download on the App Store](https://apps.apple.com/app/ask-milo-ai-chat-assistant/id6780062368): Install MILO from Apple's App Store.
- [Privacy Policy](https://askmilo.pro/privacy-policy.html): How MILO handles data.
- [Terms](https://askmilo.pro/terms.html): Terms of use.
- [Changelog](https://askmilo.pro/changelog.html): MILO app and site release notes.
